title: Fix unresponsive account creation button

requirements.text: Investigate and identify why the account creation button in the frontend does not respond when clicked, checking for event handler attachment, form validation errors, missing mutation calls, console errors, and any blocking conditions preventing the button's onClick handler from executing

quotes: Does nothing happen when I click the Buttton yes not working

acceptanceCriteria: Identify the specific cause of the unresponsive button behavior
Document any console errors or warnings related to the button click
Verify that the button's onClick handler is properly attached

requirements.text: Fix the identified issue causing the account creation button to be unresponsive, ensuring that when users click the button after entering name and email, the signup process executes and provides appropriate user feedback (loading state, success message, or error message)

quotes: Does nothing happen when I click the Buttton yes not working

acceptanceCriteria: Clicking the account creation button triggers the signup flow
Button shows a loading state while processing the request
Users receive clear feedback on success or failure of account creation
Form validation prevents submission with empty or invalid fields

constraints: Maintain existing authentication flow using Internet Identity
Preserve the current UI theme and styling patterns
nonGoals: Adding additional fields beyond name and email
